label: Transparent guineafowl motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Guineafowl transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated guineafowl spot-and-blue-head motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined guineafowl motif combining a curved black feather panel densely covered in crisp white round dots with a sculptural cobalt-blue guineafowl head accent, small ivory beak detail, subtle savanna scrub dust neutrals, accurate feather texture, crisp silhouette edges, and a premium patterned operations system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full dotted feather silhouette and blue head accent without cropping; no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving black plumage, white dot pattern, vivid blue head, ivory highlights, and precise feather detail.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no landscape, no other birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Guineafowl" / "Guineafowl" using the motif of guineafowl spots, black plumage with white dots, and a cobalt blue head from savanna scrub.
Visual identity: patterned operations system, distinctive product UI, ivory-white dot pattern over charcoal-black surfaces, cobalt and cyan-blue head accents, small ivory beak highlights, warm savanna scrub neutrals, dry grass taupe, dust beige, precise editorial operations-dashboard polish.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, dotted separators and density grids, white-dot status indicators, blue active states, charcoal patterned headers, savanna-neutral borders, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic operations UI terms such as Overview, Queue, Health, Status, Form, Table, Throughput, Conversion, Active, Pending.
Palette names visible: Plumage Black #141517, Dot White #f8f6ed, Head Blue #2e75b8, Crown Cyan #62b7d8, Savanna Dust #d7c39b, Scrub Taupe #8d7a5d, Beak Ivory #efe2bf, Alert Rust #b45f3f, Field Mist #e8e2d2, Night Roost #0b0d10.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
